title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 18 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/09/2024
Today, iron ore futures dropped significantly, ﬂuctuating downward throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2501 finally closed at675 yuan/ mt, down 4.12% for the day. Market sentiment turned more cautious, and traders showed a lower willingness to sell; steel mills mainly made low- price purchases, with some starting to restock before the holiday.
